=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_generics.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export async function refacpipe(t)orMe<X>(arg: X) {
  return await Promise.resolve(arg)
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Rewrite to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_generics.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export function refactorMe<X>(arg: X) {
    return Effect.gen(function* () {
        return yield* Effect.promise(() => Promise.resolve(arg));
    });
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to Effect.gen with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_generics.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export function refactorMe<X>(arg: X) {
    return Effect.gen(function* () {
        return yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => Promise.resolve(arg), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
    });
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Rewrite to Effect.fn" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_generics.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const refactorMe = Effect.fn("refactorMe")(function* <X>(arg: X) {
    return yield* Effect.promise(() => Promise.resolve(arg));
});


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Rewrite to Effect.fn with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_generics.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export const refactorMe = Effect.fn("refactorMe")(function* <X>(arg: X) {
    return yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => Promise.resolve(arg), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
});


=== [R1] Refactor 5: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_generics.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export async function refactorMe<X>(arg: X): Promise<X> {
  return await Promise.resolve(arg)
}
